name: Custom Payload (Plugin Message)
desc: Sends a plugin channel message from client to server. Used for mod communication.
notes: Common vanilla channels: "MC|BEdit" (book edit), "MC|BSign" (book sign), "MC|ItemName" (anvil rename), "MC|TrSel" (trade select). Mods use their own channel names.

implementation.overview: C17PacketCustomPayload sends plugin channel data from client to server. It carries a channel name (String) and binary data (PacketBuffer). The most important channel is MC|Brand (client brand, e.g. "vanilla", "fabric", "Lunar-Client"). Modifying this channel is how clients spoof their identity. Other channels handle: MC|BEdit (book editing), MC|BSign (book signing), MC|ItemName (anvil rename), MC|TrSel (villager trade select), MC|AdvCdm (command block data). Disabler modules also use C17 to send crafted payloads.

modules.name: Brand Changer / Lunar Spoofer
modules.purpose: Spoof the client brand to avoid server detection.
modules.how_it_works: Intercept C17 in EventSendPacket. If channel is MC|Brand, replace the brand string with a different one like "vanilla", "Lunar-Client", or "Badlion" (BLC).

modules.name: Server Crasher (Payload exploit)
modules.purpose: Send a crafted MC|AdvCdm payload to crash the server.
modules.how_it_works: Sends C17 with the MC|AdvCdm channel and a crafted PacketBuffer that causes the server to allocate excessive memory or throw an unhandled exception.

implementation.general_hooks: EventSendPacket. The channel name determines behavior. Servers also send S3FPacketCustomPayload with the server brand.
implementation.client_variations:
November 0.2: Lunar spoof replaces brand string.
Gugustus: BLC spoof replaces brand with "blc".
Lycoris 2.0: ServerCrasher uses MC|AdvCdm payload.
